violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Freezers need to be thawed.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Walls behind grill need to be cleaned.
Prep/vegetable sink. — --Prep sink was not plumbed with a physical air gap on the drain line. -Prep sink did have a air gap, but was covered- needs repair

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food - Raw meat found above fruit cocktail and other condiments.
Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. - Found raw meats thawing in sink with standing water.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. - Items not dated in reach-in
General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. - Freezers need to be thawed.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. -Test strips needed for QT
Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Warewash machine was not maintained and/or operated as required. - Dishwasher found dirty, needs cleaned.
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
